div.span: Loading ledgers, vouchers, aging, and cash positions…

div.p: A live view of billing, collections, obligations, liquidity, custom vouchers, approvals, VAT, and the general ledger.

section.p: Registered payments and posted Petroraq vouchers during the selected period.
Fast checks for period close, approval delays, branch/shared-journal issues, and 30-day liquidity.

div.div: No accounting movement in this period.

section.p: Uses the same Main Head and analytic dimensions as Account Ledger reporting.
